trigger_reason: R715 is rank 3 by mechanical-PASS proximity in E29 (kw=2, max sim=0.40, q=0.38). Per program_v10.md §2.5, top-3 rounds receive full step-13 spec.
candidate_stripped: An attention-head allocation that views H heads as H edge colorings of a complete graph K_N over the token positions; Ramsey's theorem guarantees existence of monochromatic structure used as a guaranteed coverage criterion.

base_model.name: Small transformer (4 layers, 4 heads, 256 hidden) trained from scratch on LRA

A_candidate.name: Ramsey-guaranteed head allocation (R715)
A_candidate.description: Pre-allocate 4 heads such that for token positions arranged as K_8 (8 positions), R(3,3)=6 guarantees monochromatic triangle in any 2-coloring. With 4 heads as 4-coloring, guarantee monochromatic K_3 sub-structure. Initialize head attention masks to enforce this combinatorial constraint at training start.
A_candidate.distinctive_parameter: Head masks initialized via Ramsey-guaranteed monochromatic structure
A_candidate.expected_behavior: If Ramsey coverage matters, A achieves lower LRA-Pathfinder error than B at same compute.

B_control.name: Random head mask initialization
B_control.description: Identical setup but head masks initialized with random binary masks (same density).
B_control.expected_behavior: Null hypothesis: random initialization matches Ramsey initialization.

C_baseline.name: Standard transformer (no head-mask init)
C_baseline.description: Standard multi-head attention without explicit masking; published LRA baseline.

metric.name: LRA-Pathfinder accuracy after 20K training steps
metric.measurement_protocol: Train each variant for 20K steps; evaluate on Pathfinder test set. Repeat with 3 seeds.

statistical_test.name: Paired t-test A vs B + paired t-test A vs C
statistical_test.expected_outcome_if_candidate_has_value: A significantly outperforms B (Ramsey init has inductive value).
statistical_test.expected_outcome_if_candidate_collapses_: A indistinguishable from B; Ramsey initialization is just one specific random init.

distinguishability_pre_check.rationale: Ramsey-guaranteed initialization SHOULD provide an inductive bias toward coverage of token-pair interactions. However, with 4 heads on K_8 positions, the Ramsey guarantee is for monochromatic K_3 (3-token sub-cliques) — which is small relative to LRA-Pathfinder's 1024-token sequences (and any random 4-mask init also covers small sub-cliques densely). The 'guarantee' is theoretically distinct but practically might match random init. Worth running.
distinguishability_pre_check.implication: Worth a pilot run. If A ≈ B, Ramsey guarantee at this scale (small head count, large token count) does not add empirical value over random init.

notes_for_executor: Small-model training keeps within T4 budget. Use LRA-Pathfinder grid 32x32 (image-classification-as-sequence). Initialize head masks via small Ramsey graph construction (Greenwood-Gleason 1955).
